revision.text: [[{{{1}}}]{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{2}}}}}] {{Documentation | content = This template provides way to wrap content in double [[square brackets]]. Examples: *{{tlx|brackets|test}} produces: {{brackets|test}} *{{tlx|brackets|test{{!}}more}} produces: {{brackets|test{{!}}more}} *{{tlx|brackets|:ja:山本五十六}} produces: {{brackets|:ja:山本五十六}} == Function == ===Function=== This template is a simple wrapper around the [[ and ]] [[HTML entities]] that produce starting and ending double brackets, respectively. === Limitations === The template cannot output just the starting double bracket or just the ending double bracket. You will have to use either [[ or ]] to achieve this. ===See also=== * {{tl|Braces}} — to wrap content in double [[curly brackets]] * {{tl|Bracket}} — to wrap content in single [[square brackets]] [[Category:Character-substitution templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text: [[{{{1}}}]{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{2}}}}}] {{Documentation | content = This template provides way to wrap content in double [[square brackets]]. Examples: *{{tlx|brackets|test}} produces: {{brackets|test}} *{{tlx|brackets|test{{!}}more}} produces: {{brackets|test{{!}}more}} *{{tlx|brackets|:ja:山本五十六}} produces: {{brackets|:ja:山本五十六}} == Function == ===Function=== This template is a simple wrapper around the [[ and ]] [[HTML entities]] that produce starting and ending double brackets, respectively. === Limitations === The template cannot output just the starting double bracket or just the ending double bracket. You will have to use either [[ or ]] to achieve this. ===See also=== * {{tl|Braces}} — to wrap content in double [[:en:Curly brackets|Curly brackets]] * {{tl|Bracket}} — to wrap content in single [[square brackets]] [[Category:Character-substitution templates]] }}

You will have to use either [[ or ]] to achieve this. ===See also=== * {{tl|Braces}} — to wrap content in double [[:en:Curly brackets|Curly brackets]] * {{tl|Bracket}} — to wrap content in single [[:en:Square brackets|Square brackets]] [[Category:Character-substitution templates]] }}

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Brackets here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]

You will have to use either [[ or ]] to achieve this. ===See also=== * {{tl|Braces}} — to wrap content in double [[:en:Curly brackets|Curly brackets]] * {{tl|Bracket}} — to wrap content in single [[:en:Square brackets|Square brackets]] [[Category:Character-substitution templates]] }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
